nodes.name: Orthotomus
nodes.summary: Orthotomus（Orthotomus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联13种鸟类，如Rufous-fronted tailorbird、黑喉缝叶莺、柬埔寨缝叶莺等13种鸟类。

nodes.name: Olive-backed tailorbird
nodes.summary: Olive-backed tailorbird（Orthotomus sepium）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Olive-backed tailorbird。

nodes.name: Olive-backed tailorbird
nodes.summary: The olive-backed tailorbird (Orthotomus sepium) is a species of passerine bird formerly placed in the "Old World warbler" assemblage, it but now placed in the family Cisticolidae. It is endemic to the islands of Java, Madura Island, Bali and Lombok. It resides in open forests, often perching on short trees and shrubs. Description It is small, with a rust-colored head. Diet It is insectivorous. It forages for caterpillars, spiders, and small insects. Social Behavior It is often seen in groups, and is known to engage in group vocalizations. References
